query: UPDATE monthly_allowances SET breakdown_formula = REPLACE(breakdown_formula, 'DDC 꼴찌', 'DDC 5위') WHERE breakdown_formula LIKE '%꼴찌%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4F6C2t2Lf5vYuZz.root --database 7FPMMwR5T9Ji4CdJvw8T5d --execute UPDATE monthly_allowances SET breakdown_formula = REPLACE(breakdown_formula, 'DDC 꼴찌', 'DDC 5위') WHERE breakdown_formula LIKE '%꼴찌%';
